title: xeranthemum erectum var. australe
intro: Xeranthemum erectum var. australe, also known as the Australian Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Xeranthemum erectum var. australe include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support immune function.
